name: King's End
startIntroPart2: For generations, King's End has stood between the realms of men and the horrors beyond the Night Lands. Rule well, Felix D'Rosier, and let no kingdom forget the price of its safety.
declaringWar: You were given peace. You mistook it for weakness.
attacked: Then come. King's End has buried greater men than you.
defeated: The Crown may fall. The Night will not care who sits upon its ruins.
introduction: I am Felix D'Rosier, King of King's End. Speak plainly.
afterPeace: Enough blood has been spent. For now.
denounced: King's End has no need of your approval.
declaringfriendship: Our realms are stronger standing together.
